hero.title: Technical setup compatibility for table tennis.
hero.description: The app combines player profile, current setup and objective dataset attributes to recommend better-fitting combinations.

settings.languageDescription: Manual language switching is prepared from the MVP to support international rollout.
settings.profileDescription: Reserved space for saved setups and athlete preferences in later iterations.

mock.notes: Current setup feels too rigid in the short game and unstable on the modern backhand.
mock.profileAnalysis: Intermediate offensive penhold-modern profile that needs balanced FH acceleration, BH stability and controlled overall weight.
mock.currentSetupPositive: The current setup already supports forehand power and first attack acceleration.
mock.currentSetupLimitation: The combination is too stiff for fine touch in the short game.
mock.currentSetupRisk: If the weight stays high, the modern backhand will likely degrade during longer sessions.
mock.roadmapNow: Replace the BH rubber first with a lighter and more stable option.
mock.roadmapLater: Reassess the blade once the unified dataset and Sonnet backend are active.
